scope: Project-level reusable Lu Qingli / 陆青砾 multi-state character identity board.

locked_references.role: global low-magic eastern epic mood lock
project material and tactile surface lock
Wallfoot, border, snowline, and north-transition palette reference
Wallfoot object-symbol reference; confirms no formal Wallfoot emblem
black-market wooden pass, broken pottery charm, grey-blue cord, old cloth, and hidden-pocket material reference

downstream_usage: episode 07-12 Lu Qingli shot continuity reference
Wallfoot hybrid costume, pocket, token, and hidden-knife handoff

batch_rules: Do not redesign existing faction emblems.
Do not create a Wallfoot hybrid faction badge or Lu Qingli personal crest.

Wallfoot hybrid identity must be object-based: grey-blue short jacket, terracotta inner layer, old yellow cloth, black wood pass, broken pottery charm, hidden pockets, narrow knife, and tiny dark-green scale arcs behind the ear.
Lu Qingli must read as a 15-16-year-old Wallfoot hybrid girl with compact fast-moving body language and a wary testing smile.
Hybrid traits stay subtle; do not monsterize her into a reptile, beast, or fantasy creature.
Clothing must be complete, practical, repaired, and role-specific, not beggar rags or a generic thief costume.
No clean Zhaoming, Suming/Qingming, Northern, Grey Wall, or newly invented emblem on her clothing, pass tag, charm, belt, or background.
No visible text, labels, captions, UI, watermark, Chinese characters, or Latin letters inside generated images.
